name: Orchid Glass Terrarium - Threshold™
description:
Bring the gorgeous beauty of the outdoors into your home with this Orchid Glass Terrarium from Threshold™. This artificial arrangement features white orchid flowers and green leaves housed in a transparent glass vase for a gorgeous look. Designed for indoor use only, this orchid terrarium is perfect for consoles, side tables or your mantle.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
